gist.headline: ComfyUI joins the hive
gist.blurb: We've officially added the ComfyUI-Pollinations-BYOP integration to our ecosystem! Now you can plug our image, video, text, and audio generation directly into your ComfyUI workflows.
gist.summary: Added a new ComfyUI integration featuring four dedicated nodes for image, video, text, and audio generation with native API key management.
gist.impact: Creators can now seamlessly weave Pollinations.ai's multi-modal generation capabilities directly into their custom ComfyUI node workflows.
gist.visual_concept: ComfyUI is known for its node-based graph interface. The visual should feature Polly the bee flying around connecting colorful wires between chunky pixel-art nodes or boxes, representing the new ComfyUI integration.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot happily connecting glowing pastel wires between chunky retro computer nodes in a cozy garden workshop. A cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watches excitedly. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
